name: rais-web
description: RAIS Pro — an enterprise manufacturing intelligence dashboard (Next.js 16 + React 19 + AI SDK v6) that ingests factory rejection/production Excel reports, classifies columns with LLM assistance, computes quality metrics deterministically, and renders executive KPI dashboards with SPC charts. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
